name: Shenzhen Forms Syntron Information Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Forms Syntron Information Co., Ltd. provides enterprise-class software products and solutions to financial institutions in China and internationally. It primarily offers products and solutions for blockchain and platform universe, as well as Lego banking products, such as iLoan, iSaving, and iWealth. The company also provides consumer finance loan core and credit approval systems, and Internet retail credit platform; and channel products and solutions comprising unified payment gateway, branch sales, personal online banking, mobile banking, faster payment systems, corporate Internet banking, mobile account opening, and smart branch terminal. In addition, it offers management products and solutions, including decision support, risk management, financial management, management accounting system, process monitoring, abnormal transaction monitoring, customer management, and customer transaction management. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
